# Prairie View A&M University SBDC - Prairie View Local Routing for Houston/77084

## Why this resource matters to Houston/77084 routing
Prairie View A&M University SBDC - Prairie View is relevant to the Houston-area SBDC search context. One of the four SBA 77084 search results; check for users near Waller County/Katy-area boundaries.

## Service area
Grimes and Waller counties

## Contact
- Address: 39725 Owens Road, Suite 106, Prairie View, TX 77445
- Phone: 936-261-9243
- Email: jtespy@pvamu.edu
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use the SBA ZIP locator as the official entry point.
- Ask for the user's business address ZIP/county before final office routing.
- For a user in 77084, do not assume the center solely from city name; verify service-area fit.
